title: afridia nepetaeformis
intro: Afridia nepetaeformis, also known as the Nepetaeformis or Mountain mint, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Geraniaceae family. It is commonly found in the Himalayan regions and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The plant is known to have various health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, relieving digestive issues, and soothing respiratory problems. In terms of herbal preparations, Afridia nepetaeformis is typically used in the form of teas, infusions, or tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
